race.comment: OF THE VIEW (9) clearly on top. She's a relatively lightly raced mare who resumed with an encouraging run at Bendigo on heavy ground, trying hard in second in what looks a stronger race. She should improve off that and gets every hope up on speed here, go close. STRUGGLE STREET (5) worked home fairly well fresh at Cranbourne over 1000m and backs up quickly here which is interesting. Up in trip should suit better and she can figure been in good form towards the end of last campaign. MRS ARCHIBALD (1) put in a much better effort third up at Geelong up to this trip having struggled badly in two runs over shorter prior. Drawn well and rates a good chance off that effort. RUSSIAN FRONT (6) was well beaten over this route fresh on heavy which is a worry in similar conditions but he should strip much fitter.
